title: History of smartphones
body: History of smartphones refers to the history and development of the smartphone. The first commercial smartphones are widely recognized to be the IBM Simon Personal Communicator, released in 1992 and General Magic Magic Cap devices released by Sony ('magic link') and Motorola ('envoy') in 1994.
